expert_rss.title: A Year of Monitoring: Anti-Data Center Narratives and Threats
expert_rss.summary:
The state of New York has established the United States’ first statewide moratorium on hyperscale data centers, framed as a bid to keep residents’ electricity bills down and protect environmental resources. Legislative proposals elsewhere similarly seek to slow the buildup of computational infrastructure that has become an important part of AI research, development, and deployment. […]

expert_rss.title: The U.S.-Iran War Escalates and Expands Horizontally
expert_rss.summary:
The declaration by U.S. and Iranian officials that their June Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) has collapsed has led not only to a revival but to a major expansion of the war. Each side has begun to violate the other’s red lines, and regional mediators have fallen back to escalation management rather than de-escalation and war […]
The post The U.S.-Iran War Escalates and Expands Horizontall

expert_rss.title: Extremist Music Communities and Online Radicalisation: The Case of the Antioch High School Shooting
expert_rss.summary: On the 22nd of January 2025, Solomon Henderson (17) opened fire inside Antioch High School. He killed fellow student Josselin Corea Escalante (16) and injured one other before turning the gun on himself. Police concluded Henderson “acted alone and had no co-conspirators”. Nevertheless, Henderson was radicalised, at least in part, by the extremist communities online that he took part in […]

expert_rss.title: Minnesota National Guard, Croatia Celebrate 30 Years of Partnership
expert_rss.summary: Minnesota and Croatia celebrated the 30th anniversary of their partnership through the National Guard Bureau's State Partnership Program during Exercise Combat Power 26, near Slunj, Croatia.

expert_rss.title: Coast Guard Monitors Chinese Vessels in the Arctic
expert_rss.summary: The Coast Guard recently monitored two Chinese research ships as they transited north through the U.S. exclusive economic zone and over the U.S. extended continental shelf in the Bering Sea.

expert_rss.title: Where Are The Aircraft Carriers: July 20, 2026

The U.S. conducted a weekend wave of strikes against Iran and announced a new round today, while the reinstated blockade of Iranian ports approaches the one-week mark.

expert_rss.title: Houthi Blockade On Saudi Red Sea Oil Transits Threatens To Widen War, Strangle Energy Supply (Updated)
